title: God Apple
description: Adds the God Apple to Minecraft, a big step up from an Enchanted Golden Apple.
body:
Behold the **God Apple**—the apex of crunchy citrusy power, now within your reach!

“I thought the Enchanted Golden Apple was the ultimate flex…until this showed up.”
> Why settle for ‘very powerful’ when you can be downright cosmic?

- Dual Acquisition: Hunt rare ingredients and craft your own God Apple… or skip the grind and buy it outright (we won’t judge).
- Invincibility, Unlocked: Become the unkillable legend of your server—no sword can pierce your armor, no potion can dull your shine.
- Extra Spare Life: Ever wished for a “Get Out of Death Free” card? This is it.
- Void-Proofed: Fall into the endless abyss? The God Apple hauls you out like it’s late for dinner.
> Ready to transcend mortality (and maybe the laws of physics)? Grab your God Apple today—and show Minecraft who’s boss.
